options.name: --agentic
options.description: Enable agentic features and AI automation

options.name: --build-arg
options.description:
Docker build argument in KEY=VALUE format (can be specified
multiple times)

options.name: --build-log
options.description:
Write devcontainer build output to a log file instead of 
console

options.name: --local-template-path
options.description:
Path to a local template directory (bypasses NuGet for 
testing)

options.name: --no-devcontainer-prompt
options.description: Skip the prompt to spawn devcontainer

options.name: --nuget-source
options.description:
Custom NuGet source/feed to search for 
templates

options.name: --prompt-build-args
options.description:
Interactively prompt for Docker build arguments with 
defaults from devcontainer.json

options.name: --tag
options.description:
NuGet tag to filter templates (default: 
pks-templates)

options.name: --template
options.description:
Template short name to use (e.g., 
pks-claude-dotnet9)

arguments.name: PROJECT_NAME
arguments.description: The name of the project to initialize

options.name: --ai-optimize
options.description: Use AI to optimize deployment strategy

options.name: --environment
options.description:
Environment to check (dev, staging, prod, 
all)

options.name: --action
options.description:
Action to perform (create, list, status, start, stop, 
remove)

options.name: --id
options.description:
Agent ID for status, start, stop, or remove 
operations

options.name: --type
options.description:
Type of agent (automation, monitoring, deployment, 
etc.)

options.name: --style
options.description:
ASCII art style (banner, block, digital, 
starwars)

arguments.name: TEXT
arguments.description: Text to convert to ASCII art

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Preview the report without creating the GitHub 
issue

options.name: --include-telemetry
options.description:
Include anonymous telemetry data in the 
report

arguments.name: MESSAGE
arguments.description:
The message or feedback to include in the 
report

options.name: --delay
options.description: Delay in milliseconds for performance demo

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enable debug mode with verbose logging

options.name: --execute
options.description:
Execute a test swarm tool to verify 
functionality

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Show what would be done without making 
changes

options.name: --output-path
options.description: Output directory path for devcontainer files

options.name: --docker-compose
options.description:
Use Docker Compose instead of single 
container

options.name: --extensions
options.description:
Comma-separated list of VS Code extensions to 
include

options.name: --features
options.description: Comma-separated list of features to include

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Run in interactive mode with prompts

options.name: --ports
options.description: Comma-separated list of ports to forward

options.name: --post-create-command
options.description: Command to run after container creation

options.name: --add-sources
options.description:
Comma-separated list of additional NuGet sources to 
include

options.name: --debug
options.description:
Enable debug output for troubleshooting template 
discovery

options.name: --expert-mode
options.description: Enable expert mode with advanced options

options.name: --from-templates
options.description:
Discover and use templates from NuGet 
packages

options.name: --quick-setup
options.description: Use quick setup with minimal prompts

options.name: --sources
options.description:
Comma-separated list of NuGet sources to use for template
discovery

arguments.name: CONFIG-PATH
arguments.description: Path to devcontainer.json file to validate

options.name: --docker-config-path
options.description:
Path to Docker config.json to forward (defaults to 
~/.docker/config.json)

options.name: --forward-docker-config
options.description:
Forward Docker credentials from host to devcontainer 
(enables private image pulls)

options.name: --no-bootstrap
options.description:
Use direct execution instead of bootstrap container 
(advanced)

options.name: --no-launch-vscode
options.description:
Don't automatically launch VS Code after 
spawning

options.name: --volume-name
options.description: Custom volume name for the devcontainer

arguments.name: PROJECT_PATH
arguments.description:
Path to project directory (defaults to current 
directory)

options.name: --format
options.description:
Output format: table or json (default: 
table)

options.name: --no-launch-vscode
options.description:
Don't automatically launch VS Code after 
connecting

arguments.name: CONTAINER_ID
arguments.description:
Container ID to connect to (optional - will prompt if not
provided)

options.name: --json
options.description:
Output result in JSON format (suppresses banner and UI 
output)

options.name: --scope
options.description:
Settings scope: user (global), project (current directory),
or local (.claude folder)

information

project

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrite existing PRD file if it exists

options.name: --interactive
options.description:
Interactive mode for detailed PRD 
generation

options.name: --name
options.description:
Name of the project (if different from current 
directory)

options.name: --output
options.description: Output path for the generated PRD file

options.name: --template
options.description:
PRD template type (standard, technical, mobile, web, api,
minimal, enterprise)

arguments.name: IDEA_DESCRIPTION
arguments.description:
Description of the idea or project to generate PRD 
for

options.name: --export
options.description: Export loaded PRD to different format

arguments.name: FILE_PATH
arguments.description: Path to the PRD file to load

options.name: --priority
options.description:
Filter by priority (critical, high, medium, low, 
nice)

options.name: --status
options.description:
Filter by requirement status (draft, approved, 
inprogress, completed, blocked, cancelled, onhold)

options.name: --type
options.description:
Filter by requirement type (functional, nonfunctional, 
business, technical, security, performance, usability, accessibility, 
compliance)

arguments.name: FILE_PATH
arguments.description:
Path to the PRD file (defaults to 
./docs/PRD.md)

options.name: --check-all
options.description:
Check status of all PRD files in the 
project

options.name: --include-history
options.description: Include change history in status report

options.name: --watch
options.description:
Watch for changes and update status in 
real-time

arguments.name: FILE_PATH
arguments.description:
Path to the PRD file (defaults to 
./docs/PRD.md)

options.name: --fix
options.description:
Attempt to automatically fix validation 
issues

./docs/PRD.md)

options.name: --output
